name_local: Catedrales de Salamanca - Vieja y Nueva

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the astronaut carving is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde veo el astronauta en la fachada?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, DON-deh VEH-oh el as-troh-NAH-tah en lah fah-CHA-dah?

likely_response.local: En la fachada de la Catedral Nueva, arriba.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN LAH fahth-AH-dah DEH LAH kah-tehd-RAHL noo-EH-bah ahr-REE-bah
likely_response.translation_en: On the New Cathedral façade, up high.

responses.english: On the New Cathedral façade, up high.
responses.phonetic: EHN LAH fahth-AH-dah DEH LAH kah-tehd-RAHL noo-EH-bah ahr-REE-bah
responses.french: En la fachada de la Catedral Nueva, arriba.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to buy tower climb tickets
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde compro entradas para subir?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, DOHN-deh KOHM-proh ehn-TRAH-dahs PAH-rah soo-BEER?

likely_response.local: En la taquilla, al fondo a la izquierda.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN LAH tah-k-EEL-lah AHL FOHN-doh AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
likely_response.translation_en: At the ticket office, at the back on the left.

responses.english: At the ticket office, at the back on the left.
responses.phonetic: EHN LAH tah-k-EEL-lah AHL FOHN-doh AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
responses.french: En la taquilla, al fondo a la izquierda.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the audio guide pickup is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde puedo recoger la audioguía?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, DOHN-deh PWEH-doh reh-koh-HEHR lah ow-tyoh-GEE-ah?

likely_response.local: En el mostrador de información, a la derecha.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN EHL moh-strah-DOHR DEH een-fohr-mah-thee-ÓN AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
likely_response.translation_en: At the information desk, on the right.

responses.english: At the information desk, on the right.
responses.phonetic: EHN EHL moh-strah-DOHR DEH een-fohr-mah-thee-ÓN AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
responses.french: En el mostrador de información, a la derecha.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if combined ticket covers both cathedrals
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿la entrada combinada incluye ambas catedrales?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, lah en-TRAH-dah kom-bee-NAH-dah een-KLOO-yeh AHM-bahs kah-teh-DRAH-les?

likely_response.local: Sí, incluye acceso a ambas catedrales.
likely_response.pronunciation: SÍ eenth-LOO-yeh ahth-THEH-soh AH AHM-bahs kah-tehd-RAH-lehs
likely_response.translation_en: Yes, it includes access to both cathedrals.

responses.english: Yes, it includes access to both cathedrals.
responses.phonetic: SÍ eenth-LOO-yeh ahth-THEH-soh AH AHM-bahs kah-tehd-RAH-lehs
responses.french: Sí, incluye acceso a ambas catedrales.
